emails.subject: Re: EnronOnline Phase 2 Meeting
emails.body: Re: EnronOnline Phase 2 Meeting I'll be there is it really only to last 2 hours? Louise Kitchen 02/28/2000 06:10 PM

emails.subject: Re: EnronOnline Phase 2 Meeting
emails.body: Re: EnronOnline Phase 2 Meeting I'll be there is it really only to last 2 hours? Louise Kitchen 02/28/2000 06:10 PM

emails.subject: Re: EnronOnline Phase 2 Meeting
emails.body: Mark, No. Sometime today you will receive an UPDATE email regarding the times and location from David Forster. It is scheduled to be an all day meeting, beginning at 8:00 a.m. and breakfast available at 7:30 a.m.. Lydia 3-9975
